channel.title: Recursive Self-Improvement on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Recursive Self-Improvement on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: commandline: The durable asset is the loop you own. OpenEnv is its protocol.
item.description:
The article argues that the durable asset in agentic AI is the learning loop, not the rented model, and presents OpenEnv as the protocol for reinforcement learning environments. It positions OpenEnv around owning and standardizing the environment/evaluation loop for recursive self-improvement.

  • Source: Microsoft Command Line Blog
